name: Rhubarb Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend sugar, flour, and nutmeg together.
2. Beat the eggs into the mixture.
3. Add the sliced rhubarb to the filling.
4. Line a 9-inch pie plate with pastry dough.
5. Fill the pie plate with the rhubarb mixture and dot with butter.
6. Top with a lattice crust.
7. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 to 60 minutes.
8. Cool completely before serving.
